meanings.definition: the trait of sincere and steadfast fixity of purpose
examples: a man of energy and commitment

meanings.definition: the act of binding yourself (intellectually or emotionally) to a course of action
examples: his long commitment to public service
they felt no loyalty to a losing team

meanings.definition: an engagement by contract involving financial obligation
examples: his business commitments took him to London

meanings.definition: a message that makes a pledge
the official act of consigning a person to confinement (as in a prison or mental hospital)
